title: Auto Emergency Hammer With Seatbelt Cutter and Window Punch
description:
Roadside Emergency Escape Car Hammer - After a bad car accident a few seconds can mean the difference between life and death for you and your loved ones. This emergency multi tool helps you to escape quickly after a car accident. Many people fear wearing a seat belt in case they were to be trapped in a burning or sinking vehicle. Electric windows do not work without power and would need to be shattered so you could escape. The surgically sharp blade effortlessly cuts through a tangled seat belt (recessed for safety), the pointed steel head (with red plastic protective cover) shatters windows with ease. Simply keep it in your glove box or emergency kit. Perfect for a gift or stocking stuffer.

Auto Emergency Hammer With Seatbelt Cutter and Window Punch

Roadside Emergency Escape Car Hammer - After a bad car accident a few seconds can mean the difference between life and death for you and your loved ones. This emergency multi tool helps you to escape quickly after a car accident. Many people fear wearing a seat belt in case they were to be trapped in a burning or sinking vehicle. Electric windows do not work without power and would need to be shattered so you could escape. The surgically sharp blade effortlessly cuts through a tangled seat belt (recessed for safety), the pointed steel head (with red plastic protective cover) shatters windows with ease. Simply keep it in your glove box or emergency kit. Perfect for a gift or stocking stuffer.

Key Features

  • ESSENTIAL AUTO SAFETY TOOL - This must have car emergency hammer could be the difference between life and death for you or a loved one.
  • SEATBELT CUTTER - A recessed razor edged blade prevents cuts and allows easy escape from car restraints.
  • WINDOW BREAKER - The dual-sided hammer head shatters and breaks out car windows to assist escaping from rolled or submerged vehicles or vehicles with door damage.
  • REFLECTIVE HEAD TAG - The reflective head allows for quick and easy spotting in various emergency conditions.
  • PERFECT STOCKING STUFFER - This compact emergency hammer makes a perfect small gift for teens, loved ones, and friends.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: AS432-EH2P
  • UPC: 706569225679
  • Color: Orange
